title: Benchmark recursive project discovery performance
description: Add reproducible benchmarks that simulate loading task corpora from multiple project folders in a monorepo to measure indexing latency. Compare single-folder vs recursive multi-folder discovery for Python and Rust.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: All benchmark tasks complete: deterministic fixtures, Python/Rust discovery benchmarks with serial/parallel results, and check_benchmarks integration.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Benchmarks exist for Python and Rust, run deterministically on local fixtures, and report timings for single project vs recursive discovery across multiple projects.
